title: Entertainment Hub with Proxy, Games, and Shows

requirements.text: Design a bold, dark-themed visual identity for the site with a neon accent color scheme (e.g., electric green or cyan on near-black backgrounds), modern sans-serif typography, and a consistent card-based layout across all sections. Apply the theme globally.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages share the same dark background and neon accent colors
Typography is consistent across headings, labels, and body text
No unstyled or default-browser-styled elements are visible

requirements.text: Create a top navigation bar with the site logo/name and links to three main sections: Proxy, Games, and Shows. The active section should be visually highlighted.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar is visible on all pages
Clicking each nav link scrolls to or navigates to the correct section
Active section link has a distinct visual indicator

requirements.text: Build a Proxy section that embeds an iframe-based web proxy allowing users to type a URL and load it inside the page. Include a URL input field, a 'Go' button, and a full-width iframe display area below the input.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can type a URL and click Go to load a site in the iframe
The iframe is displayed below the input in a clearly bounded container
Input field has placeholder text like 'Enter a URL...'
HTTPS URLs are accepted and passed to the iframe src

requirements.text: Build a Games section displaying a grid of playable browser games as cards. Each card shows a game title, a thumbnail image, and a Play button. Clicking Play loads the game in an iframe overlay or dedicated view within the page. Include at least 6 game entries (e.g., Snake, Tetris, 2048, Pac-Man, Flappy Bird, Minesweeper) as embedded HTML5 or iframe games from publicly accessible sources.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 game cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card has a title, thumbnail, and Play button
Clicking Play loads the game in an iframe or inline view
Games are accessible without login

requirements.text: Build a Shows section displaying a grid of show/video content cards. Each card shows a show title, a cover image, and a Watch button. Clicking Watch loads the video content in an embedded iframe (e.g., from a public YouTube playlist or embed URL). Include at least 6 show entries.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 6 show cards are displayed in a responsive grid
Each card has a title, cover image, and Watch button
Clicking Watch opens the video in an embedded iframe or modal
Show cards are visually distinct from game cards

requirements.text: Create a hero/landing section at the top of the homepage with a headline, a short tagline describing the site (e.g., 'Browse freely. Play games. Watch shows.'), and quick-access buttons linking to each section.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is the first visible element on page load
Headline and tagline are displayed prominently
Three CTA buttons link to Proxy, Games, and Shows sections respectively

requirements.text: Store a static list of games and shows in the backend as stable data records (title, description, embed URL, thumbnail URL). Expose query functions to retrieve all games and all shows.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend has a query function that returns the list of games
Backend has a query function that returns the list of shows
Each record includes at minimum: id, title, description, embedUrl, thumbnailUrl

constraints: Do not implement user authentication or login walls for accessing content
All embedded iframes must use publicly accessible URLs; no paid or gated content sources
Keep all Motoko logic in a single actor file (backend/main.mo)

required: Dark neon-themed hero banner with abstract glowing grid lines and a subtle cityscape silhouette (hero-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
Neon-style logo mark icon with an abstract 'N' or hub symbol in cyan on dark background (nexhub-logo.dim_128x128.png)
Placeholder game card thumbnail with a retro pixel-art controller icon on dark background (game-thumb-default.dim_400x240.png)
Placeholder show card thumbnail with a retro film reel icon on dark background (show-thumb-default.dim_400x240.png)
